---
name: Maintenance Report
about: Report maintenance or housekeeping tasks
title: "Maintenance: [Short description]"
labels: maintenance

---

**Maintenance Task Description**
A clear and concise description of the maintenance task needed.

**Task Details**
- What needs to be maintained/cleaned/refactored?
- Are there any dependencies or prerequisites?

**Expected Outcome**
What will be the result after completing this maintenance task?

**Additional context**
Add any other context about the maintenance task here.
